label: 7555 ARMS Initiative loan guarantee program

children.heading: .—Program Authorized
children.label: a .—Program Authorized
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), the Secretary may carry out a loan guarantee program to encourage commercial firms to use eligible facilities under this chapter. Under any such program, the Secretary may guarantee the repayment of any loan made to a commercial firm to fund, in whole or in part, the establishment of a commercial activity to use an eligible facility under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Advanced Budget Authority
children.label: b .—Advanced Budget Authority
children.text: Loan guarantees under this section may not be committed except to the extent that appropriations of budget authority to cover their costs are made in advance, as required by section 504 of the Federal Credit Reform Act of 1990 ().2 U.S.C. 661c

children.label: C
children.text: provide any other services to the Secretary to administer the loan guarantee program.

children.label: A
children.text: The Administrator of the Small Business Administration.

children.label: i
children.text: the Administrator of the Farmers Home Administration; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Administrator of the Rural Development Administration.

Each official authorized to do so under an agreement entered into under paragraph (1) may guarantee loans under this section to commercial firms of any size, notwithstanding any limitations on the size of applicants imposed on other loan guarantee programs that the official administers.

To the extent practicable, each official processing loan guarantee applications under this section pursuant to an agreement entered into under paragraph (1) shall use the same processing procedures as the official uses for processing loan guarantee applications under other loan guarantee programs that the official administers.
$20,000,000, with respect to any single borrower; and

children.heading: .—Transfer of Funds
children.label: e .—Transfer of Funds
children.text: The Secretary may transfer to an official providing services under subsection (c), and that official may accept, such funds as may be necessary to administer the loan guarantee program under this section.
